title: Debug logging in recorder.rs should be behind a flag
description: Lines 120-123 in src/recorder.rs: StateChanged logging is debug cruft that prints during normal operation. Either remove it or put behind a --verbose flag or RUST_LOG environment variable using the tracing crate.

title: Add video-report label to beads issues
description: In src/main.rs create_beads_issue(), add --label video-report to the bd create command to match the old Python implementation behavior.

title: Clean up temporary MP4 files after Gemini upload
description: When converting MKV to MP4 for Gemini upload (src/analyzer.rs), the converted MP4 file at `{original_path}.mp4` is never deleted. These files accumulate in ~/Videos/AyEye alongside the MKV originals. Should delete the temp MP4 after successful upload, or use a proper temp file path.

title: Temp file collision risk
description: In src/analyzer.rs:68-71, temp MP4 files use only the original filename stem. If two recordings have the same filename, they could overwrite each other. Add a UUID or unique suffix to the temp filename.

title: Magic sleep duration in recorder.rs
description: Line 88 in src/recorder.rs: Hardcoded `Duration::from_millis(500)` sleep with comment 'Give a little extra time for the stream to stabilize' but no explanation of why 500ms or what instability is being addressed. Add a constant with documentation or remove if unnecessary.

title: Bug: PathBuf::from with tilde does not expand
description: Line 13-14 in src/config.rs: `PathBuf::from("~/.config/ayeye")` does not expand the tilde. This fallback path would fail silently on systems where ProjectDirs and BaseDirs both return None. Use dirs::home_dir() or shellexpand crate instead.

title: Inline struct definitions in analyzer.rs are verbose
description: Lines 115-133 and 218-241 in src/analyzer.rs: Struct definitions for API response deserialization (UploadResponse, FileInfo, StatusResponse, GenerateResponse, Candidate, Content, Part) are inlined mid-function. Consider moving to module-level or using serde attributes for cleaner code.

title: Over-defensive fallback chain in config.rs
description: Lines 8-15 in src/config.rs: The unwrap_or_else chain with multiple fallbacks is overly paranoid. ProjectDirs::from() reliably returns Some on Linux. Simplify the config directory resolution.

title: Inline is_beads_directory function
description: Lines 68-73 in src/main.rs: is_beads_directory() is a 2-line function called only once. Consider inlining it at the call site for simplicity.

title: Redundant mp4_path.clone() in analyzer.rs
description: Line 47 in src/analyzer.rs: `mp4_path.clone()` is redundant - the `mp4_path` is already owned and could be moved directly into the tuple.

title: No timeout on Gemini processing loop
description: In src/analyzer.rs:160-182, the loop waiting for file status to become ACTIVE has no timeout. If Gemini gets stuck in PROCESSING state, the program hangs forever. Add a 5-minute timeout.

title: Duplicate code in format_issue_body and format_issue_markdown
description: Lines 109-144 and 146-172 in src/main.rs: These two functions share ~80% identical code. Extract common formatting logic into a shared helper or use a single function with a format parameter.

title: Temp MP4 not cleaned up on error paths
description: In src/analyzer.rs, if any error occurs after the temp MP4 is created (ffmpeg conversion) but before the cleanup at the end of the function, the temp file is leaked. This includes upload failures, video processing failures, generation failures, and JSON parse failures.
